name_cn:
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
The BABY version of the fine suede deer leather handbag. Leather buckle closure. This handbag has a soft structure, paired with a matching suede lining, lightweight and graceful. It features an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder-wear~ For a light and small bag in summer, this is the top choice!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Style: 809461
